# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: {{ properties.get("subnetCidr", "10.10.0.0/24") }}
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true

- name: app-router
  type: compute.v1.router
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    nats:
    - name: app-nat
      natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
      sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: ALL_SUBNETWORKS_ALL_IP_RANGES
      logConfig:
        enable: false
        filter: ERRORS_ONLY

- name: app-allow-healthcheck
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "{{ properties.get('appPort', 8080) }}"

- name: app-allow-ssh-iap
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.235.240.0/20
    targetTags:
    - app
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"

- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: {{ properties.get("serviceAccountId", "app-sa") }}
    displayName: App Service Account

- name: app-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ properties.get("bucketName", env["project"] + "-app-bucket") }}
    location: {{ properties.get("bucketLocation", properties["region"]) }}
    storageClass: {{ properties.get("bucketClass", "STANDARD") }}
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: {{ properties.get("bucketVersioning", true) }}

- name: app-db-private-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: {{ properties.get("dbPeeringPrefixLength", 16) }}
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

- name: app-db-peering
  type: servicenetworking.v1.connection
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    service: servicenetworking.googleapis.com
    reservedPeeringRanges:
    - $(ref.app-db-private-range.name)

- name: app-sql
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-db-peering
  properties:
    name: {{ properties.get("sqlInstanceName", "app-sql") }}
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    databaseVersion: {{ properties.get("dbVersion", "POSTGRES_15") }}
    settings:
      tier: {{ properties.get("dbTier", "db-custom-1-3840") }}
      availabilityType: {{ properties.get("dbAvailabilityType", "ZONAL") }}
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: {{ properties.get("dbBackupsEnabled", true) }}
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

- name: app-db
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    name: {{ properties.get("dbName", "appdb") }}
    instance: $(ref.app-sql.name)
    charset: UTF8
    collation: en_US.UTF8

- name: app-db-user
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    name: {{ properties.get("dbUser", "appuser") }}
    instance: $(ref.app-sql.name)
    password: {{ properties["dbPassword"] }}

- name: app-healthcheck
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: TCP
    tcpHealthCheck:
      port: {{ properties.get("appPort", 8080) }}
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      tags:
        items:
        - app
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      machineType: {{ properties.get("machineType", "e2-medium") }}
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: {{ properties.get("sourceImage", "projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12") }}
          diskSizeGb: {{ properties.get("bootDiskGb", 20) }}
      networkInterfaces:
      - subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -euo pipefail
            export APP_PORT="{{ properties.get('appPort', 8080) }}"
            export DB_HOST="$(ref.app-sql.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)"
            export DB_NAME="{{ properties.get('dbName', 'appdb') }}"
            export DB_USER="{{ properties.get('dbUser', 'appuser') }}"
            export DB_PASSWORD="{{ properties['dbPassword'] }}"
            export BUCKET="{{ properties.get('bucketName', env['project'] + '-app-bucket') }}"
            apt-get update -y
            apt-get install -y nginx
            cat >/etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
            server {
              listen ${APP_PORT};
              location / {
                return 200 'ok';
                add_header Content-Type text/plain;
              }
            }
            EOF
            systemctl restart nginx

- name: app-mig
  type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    baseInstanceName: app
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: {{ properties.get("instanceCount", 2) }}
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: {{ properties.get("appPort", 8080) }}

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-healthcheck.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.app-mig.instanceGroup)

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    name: {{ properties.get("lbIpName", "app-lb-ip") }}

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-ip.address)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "80"
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)

outputs:
- name: loadBalancerIp
  value: $(ref.app-ip.address)
- name: sqlInstanceConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-sql.connectionName)
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-bucket.name)
- name: network
  value: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
- name: subnetwork
  value: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
